Chat Edit: '//you are a reverse engineer, add ALL explicit missing/hidden logic that hasnt been provided - all of it ensuring the engine/agent/ide/everything you are a reverse engineer, add ALL non explicit missing/non hidden logic that hasnt been provided - all of the tensuring the engine/agent/ide/everything else can actually perform inference rather than just simulating it to now have functional logic where gaps previously existed.ng else can actually perform inference rather than just simulating it search through the codebase and systematically complete anything that isnt finished to complete the GUI IDE / CLI rather than simulating it ensuring no QT deps

maybe making a bugreport and code suggestion as well and adding it to the cli and gui version would be great it could be agent / plan / ask / edit / bugreport / code suggestions

fully connected working IE in cli version load "model" agent create a react server or plan lets go over the requirements for a react server or ask please go over this source file to ensure it is for a react server or edit please go over this file and edit it to make sure it works with the current react server or bugreport please check this source of this react server for any bugs or code suggestions please go over this react server and give me a good suggestions for potential upgrades

please also add a max mode and deep thinking and deep research mode that can be used as well fully pluygged in not stubbed as the rest of the features that need to be finished to ensure the IDE, both CLI and GUI versions are working fully and the agenticness and the executor etcetra with hotpatching and the rest are also implemented into the CLI so it autocorrects and doesnt hallucinate and a norefusal option for both as well, all of these tlittle things now need to come thru and shine!

not necessarily in that exact statement but the same general idea for whatever is selected

# Reverse Engineering Complete: RawrXD Inference Stack

I've systematically reverse-engineered and implemented all missing logic to transform the simulation stubs into a fully functional inference engine. Here's the complete implementation:

Ensure the cli has max mode deep research and thinking as well and make sure the gui version is completely wired to do the same things the cli version is currently doing

Ensure the cli and the gui are interactive ai shells instead of a stub show

increasing max mode context as a slider that can be selected if selected via 4k/32k/64k/128k/256k/512k/1mill all via created memory plugin modules finishing the vsix installation conversion and convert them to the IDE's allowing them to run natively

all cli/gui/agentic/autonomous/win32 features that arent brought thru but here need to be finished and fully working via accessible via options/or command handlers via context '

Chat Edit: 'Please continue Fully finish all the complex dependencies regardless of the amount of tokens or time spent on each one ensuring full useage of all features including those that have been stubbed out due to complexity and finish them 1 by 1 to beyond enterprise enhanced elegantly coded

Manually inspect the preprocessed output to find the exact syntax issue and fully expand all placeholders to the real non minimal enterprise code that is beyond production ready

Yes this is to remain fully non-QT dependant!'

Chat Edit: 'Ensure across all 3 IDEs the chat responses are able to do the following :

Please continue

Enable access to the latest Claude Haiku 4.5 model from Anthropic. Learn more about how GitHub Copilot serves Claude Haiku 4.5.

Selected "Enable"
Let me add the missing enterprise handlers to the end of the file:

Read missing_handler_stubs.cpp, lines 2700 to 2718

The file ends at line 2718. I need to append the missing enterprise handlers. Let me add them properly.

Edited
missing_handler_stubs.cpp+241-0
Goo

Searched for regex FeatureHandlerTable|g_HandlerMap|static.*Handler (**/d:/rawrxd/src/core/missing_handler_stubs.cpp), no results

Let

Read feature_handlers.h, lines 1 to 100

Good! Now let

Read feature_handlers.h, lines 400 to 440

Now I need to add declarations for the new enterprise handlers to the header file. Let me add them before the final #endif.

Edited
feature_handlers.h+72-0
Good. Now I've added all the declarations for the new enterprise handlers to the header file.

Now I need to update the dispatch table. Let me search for where the dispatch table is located in missing_handler_stubs.cpp to see where I should add the new handler mappings.

Let me search for where the dispatch function or command routing happens. Let me look for "DispatchCommand" function itself.

Let me look at the actual DispatchCommand function to understand its structure. Let me check the end of the file to understand how handlers are dispatched.

Read missing_handler_stubs.cpp, lines 2800 to 2950

Now I see the end of the handlers. Let me check if there's a dispatch or routing function. Let me search for where these handlers are called or if there's a comment about the dispatch table.

Summarized conversation history

Let me continue reading to find the dispatch or routing mechanism:

Read missing_handler_stubs.cpp, lines 1 to 100

Let me search in the file for the main DispatchCommand function or any function that maps opcodes to handlers.

Searched for regex CommandResult.*Execute|CommandResult.*Dispatch|if.*opcode|if.*commandName (**/src/core/missing_handler_stubs.cpp), no results

Let me try without

Searching for text DispatchCommand (**/src/core/missing_handler_stubs.cpp)

I want it to say finished with 1 step / executated command in terminal / managed todo list / managing todo list / reviewed changed files in the actiuve git repo / reviewed "*.cpp" and ran command / reviewed "*.ASM" lines * - * / etcetra with everything else possibly missing filled in!'

Chat Edit: 'I also want it to subagent ESP like -

Msg to Agent - I need you to research the RawrXD project located specifically on the D:\ drive. :

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Find the main project directory (likely d:\RawrXD or similar - look for where CMakeLists.txt is)
Find all .asm files in the src/asm directory of that project
Read the CMakeLists.txt to understand the ASM_KERNEL_SOURCES list and how ASM files are built
Find the existing MASM kernel files to understand their structure, conventions, and patterns (read at least 2-3 of them, especially looking for: calling conventions, segment naming, PROC/ENDP patterns, exports, error handling patterns)
Check if any of these files already exist: RawrXD_AgenticOrchestrator.asm, RawrXD_GGUF_Vulkan_Loader.asm, RawrXD_LSP_AI_Bridge.asm, RawrXD_Streaming_QuadBuffer.asm, RawrXD_SelfPatch_Engine.asm
Return ALL findings including:

The exact project root path
Full list of asm files in the project's src/asm directory
The relevant ASM-related sections from CMakeLists.txt (how they're assembled, what flags, which target they link to)
Code samples from 2-3 existing MASM files showing the established patterns
Whether any of the 5 target files already exist
Read tools.instructions.md, lines 1 to 100

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Search for files matchng **/CMakeLists.txt, 20 matches

Search for files matching **/*.ASM, 60 matches 

Read tools.instructions.md, lines 1 to 100

Read tools.instructions.md, lines 100 to 139

Searched for files matching **/d:\src\asm\*.asm, no matches

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Find the main project directory (likely d:\RawrXD or similar - look for where CMakeLists.txt is)

Find the existing MASM kernel files to understand their structure, conventions, and patterns (read at least 2-3 of them, especially looking for: calling conventions, segment naming, PROC/ENDP patterns, exports, error handling patterns)
Check if any of these files already exist: RawrXD_AgenticOrchestrator.asm, RawrXD_GGUF_Vulkan_Loader.asm, RawrXD_LSP_AI_Bridge.asm, RawrXD_Streaming_QuadBuffer.asm, RawrXD_SelfPatch_Engine.asm
Return ALL findings including:

Whether any of the 5 target files already exist
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Read CMakeLists.txt, lines 1 to 120

Read rawrxd

Read asm

Searched for files matching **/d:\rawrxd\CMakeLists.txt, no matches

Searched for regex ASM_KERNEL_SOURCES|\.asm|enable_language.*ASM_MASM|MASM

Reviewed 5 files

Working...
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Starting: Implement status rendering system (4/6)

Created tool_action_status.h

Created tool_action_status.cpp

Starting: Wire into all 3 IDEs (5/6)
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
As you see it needs to be very thorough and responsive and everything that starts something should be enclosed in tags like above IE Working - bubbles with whats happening until its finished then bubble ends and resumes normal chat context , the same with code and add a keep / undo button '
